text_layer.internal_prompt:
Short Russian promo headlines for Telegram/VK. Use confident, playful language. Image headline should be 2-6 words, large and readable.
сделай картинку для монополии история знакомства

profile.text_style_rules: Short Russian promo headlines for Telegram/VK. Use confident, playful language. Image headline should be 2-6 words, large and readable.
profile.image_style_rules: Bright board-game promo illustration, expressive characters, gold/red accents, clean commercial finish. Generate illustration as a separate layer.
profile.composition_rules: Assemble final PNG from background, illustration and text layers. Keep headline large, safe margins clear, CTA/caption separate from AI image text.
profile.negative_rules: Do not generate final banner text inside AI image. Avoid distorted Cyrillic, random logos, tiny text, clutter and watermark-like marks.
profile.asset_rules: Prefer safe approved Monopoly backgrounds, reusable character/illustration layers, logo zones and template layouts. Keep assets stable during unrelated revisions.
